Interface AtomChannelData

All Known Subinterfaces:
AtomChannel, FeedChannel
All Known Implementing Classes:
AtomChannelDataImpl, AtomChannelImpl, FeedChannelImpl
public interface AtomChannelData
Provides access to Atom-specific data for a feed channel, including links, authors, and contributors.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    addAtomAuthor(AtomAuthor atomAuthor)
    Adds an Atom author.

    Adds an Atom contributor.

    Adds an Atom link.
    default List<AtomAuthor>
    getAtomAuthors()
    Returns the list of Atom authors.
    AtomChannelData
    getAtomChannelData()
    Returns the underlying Atom channel data.
    default List<AtomContributor>
    getAtomContributors()
    Returns the list of Atom contributors.
    default List<AtomLink>
    getAtomLinks()
    Returns the list of Atom links.
